privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetically generated documents created locally via setup_task.sh. The expected target output document path is /home/ga/Documents/phase1_esa_report.odt and the formatting specifications path is /home/ga/Desktop/esa_formatting_spec.txt. The document text explicitly contains 8 main sections ('Executive Summary', 'Introduction', etc.) and 9 subsections ('Purpose and Scope', 'Site Location and Legal Description', etc.). It features specific keywords ('ASTM E1527', 'petroleum hydrocarbons', etc.) and expected sentences for alignment checks ('The site reconnaissance was conducted on October 15, 2025', etc.), all of which are exactly verified by analyzing the python string injection in the setup script.
